title: HRANA Reports 24,669 Protesters Detained
detail: The Human Rights Activists News Agency (HRANA) publishes a comprehensive detainee report documenting 24,669 confirmed detentions since the protests began. The report identifies 847 detained minors, 2,100 university students, and 340 journalists and media workers. HRANA warns that conditions in overcrowded prisons are 'dire' with reports of torture and forced confessions.

title: 494th EFS F-15Es Begin Deploying from RAF Lakenheath
detail: The first wave of F-15E Strike Eagles from the 494th Expeditionary Fighter Squadron at RAF Lakenheath, UK, begins deploying to bases in the Middle East. A total of 35 aircraft will arrive between January 18-21. The deployment includes ground support crews and precision-guided munitions packages, signaling preparation for potential strike operations rather than a defensive posture.

title: Iranian Proxies Issue Warnings to US Forces
detail: Hezbollah Secretary-General Naim Qassem warns that any US military action against Iran would trigger retaliation against American bases across the Middle East. Kata'ib Hezbollah in Iraq issues a similar statement. The Houthis in Yemen declare the Red Sea 'off limits to American warships.' The coordinated messaging signals Iran's axis of resistance activating deterrence posture.
